name: Releases · fahrez182/AxManager - GitHub
snippet:
fahrez182/AxManager.
New: AxRuntime (currently in preparation) is introduced as a CLI runtime for AxManager. It functions similarly to su, but is designed to acquire ADB-level permissions. New: Permission flags are now globalized. All applications can obtain AxManager Runtime permissions without per-app binding.

name: Axeron Manager (AxManager) Installation Guide No Root Needed!
snippet: Unlock the full potential of your Android device without Root! In today's video, I'm showing you exactly how to install and set up Axeron ...

name: AxManager - fahrez182.github.io
snippet: AxManager is an Android application designed to provide deeper control over apps and the system.

name: GitHub - fahrez182/AxManager: AxManager is an Android
snippet: Axeron Manager (AxManager) is a Proof of Concept (POC) for a self-created environment on Android that leverages ADB permissions to provide system-level control.

name: 用户手册 | AxManager
snippet: AxManager is an Android application designed to provide deeper control over apps and the system.

name: AxManager免Root搞机指南（小白向保姆级教程） - 知乎
snippet: AxManager 的本质到底是什么 AxManager 也就是 Axeron Manager 你可以简单把它理解成 Shizuku 的加强版 它本质上就是 支持无线调试的脚本执行器 再加上一个插件容器 它的核心逻辑很简单 用无线调试拿到 ADB 权限 再用一个看起来像管理器的 UI 去执行那些 Shell 命令

name: AxManager+SukiSU+Zhang3Tool免root模块 - CSDN博客
snippet: 以下是 AxManager、SukiSU Ultra 与 Zhang3Tool 的 超详细安装与使用指南（2025 年最新版），内容全面、步骤清晰，适用于新手和进阶用户。 所有方法均基于当前主流 Android 系统（Android 10~14）、主流机型（小米/红米/三星/一加/魅族/OPPO/真我等），并附带常见问题解决方案。
